MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Park Merced Investors is present.
Attorney, Daniel Stern, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Patrick McDonnal, is present.
Attorney, Aaron Farmer, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-13-2010 is vacated.
